info.title: nuget-merge
info.description: A .NET tool that lets you merge multiple .nupkg file into a single package.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Merges multiple .nupkg files into a single package.

options.name: --output
options.description: Path to the output .nupkg file. If not specified, the first input file is overwritten.

options.name: --force
options.description: Overwrite the output file if it already exists. [default: False]

options.name: --deterministic
options.description: Produce a deterministic package merge. [default: False]

options.name: --verbosity
options.description: Set the verbosity level. Allowed values are q[uiet], m[inimal], n[ormal], d[etailed], and diag[nostic].

arguments.name: INPUT_FILES
arguments.description: One or more .nupkg files to merge. Files are merged in the order they are provided.
